ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` -4 option Resolve to IPv4 addresses only.
The `dnf command ref` -6 option Resolve to IPv6 addresses only.
The `dnf command ref` --advisory= option Include packages corresponding to the advisory ID, Eg.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Include packages corresponding to the advisory ID, Eg.

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` --allowerasing option Allow erasing of installed packages to resolve dependencies.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Allow erasing of installed packages to resolve dependencies.

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` --assumeno option Automatically answer no for all questions.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Automatically answer no for all questions.

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` -b option Try the best available package versions in transactions.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Try the best available package versions in transactions.

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` --bugfix option Include packages that fix a bugfix issue.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Include packages that fix a bugfix issue.

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` --bz= option Include packages that fix a Bugzilla ID, Eg.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Include packages that fix a Bugzilla ID, Eg.

ir_specs.statement: The `dnf command ref` -C option Run entirely from system cache, don’t update the cache and use it even in case it is expired.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Run entirely from system cache, don’t update the cache and use it even in case it is expired.
